rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s method (Bayesian graded-response IRT combining direct and randomized-response questioning, with a latent class for RR nonadherence) closely overlaps the cited paper’s core contribution (polytomous item randomized response + graded-response IRT, also with noncompliance handling). Given this strong methodological and domain continuity in measuring social-desirability underreporting, the DOI-matched reference is plausibly foundational/method-sourcing rather than an incidental mention.
